en.loadgame: Do you have a save? Type 1!
en.nameusr:
Impressive... 
 Most Impressive... 
 I have no record of you... 
 What's your name?
en.class: Did you ever had a job...?
en.classc:
Jobs: 
 Hobo: Class with a lot of luck, even getting free equipment. 
 Magician: Class that focuses on MP generation and magic attacks. 
 Security: Focused on raw power while being very frail. 
 Foreman: Tank capable of redirecting damage to himself instead of allies. 
 Chef: Capable of curing and applying buffs to allies while applying debuffs to enemies. 
 To choose your class by typing 1 to 5.
en.sure:
Are you certain? 
 Type 1 for yes or 2 for no.
en.combat: Type 1 to attack, 2 to use magic, 3 to use items if you have any.
en.map1:
City map: 
 Type 1 for the Cafe (lvl req: 1) 
 Type 2 to go to the workshop (lvl req: 10) 
 Type 3 for the Tanban (minigames) (lvl req: 1) 
 Type 4 for the bar (lvl req: 2) 
 Type 5 for the Pawn Shop (lvl req: 4) 
 (lvl necessário: 4) 
 Dungeons 
 type 6 to go to the Liang Qui (lvl req: 1) 
 Type 7 to go to the Feizhua (lvl req: 10) 
 Type 8 for the Jiangyang Ryu (Dungeon) (lvl req: 15) 
 Type 9 to go the Fuxi Donzen (lvl req: 20) 
 Type 0 to save and quit the game
en.LHea: Low healing to selected Member (3 HP pts)
en.MHea: Medium healing to selected Member (5 HP pts)
en.Hhea: High healing to selected Member (9 HP pts)
en.Ehea: Extreme healing to selected Member (15 HP) pts

pt.nameusr:
Impressionante... 
 Muito Impressionante... 
 Não se sabe nada sobre você... 
 Qual é seu nome?
pt.classc:
Classes: 
 Hobo: Classe com muita sorte, consegue diversos tipos de equipamentos de graça 
 Magician: Classe focada na geração de MP e ataques mágicos 
 Security: Focado em dano puro, mas tendo pouca vida. 
 Foreman: Tanque capaz de redirecionar dano para ele em vez de seus aliados. 
 Chef: Capaz de adicionar buffs e curar aliados, também consegue aplicar debuffs a oponentes. 
 Para escoher sua classe digite do 1 ao 5.
pt.classno: Classe não reconhecida, por favor digite do 1 ao 5.
pt.sure: Você tem certeza? Digite 1 para sim e 2 para não.
pt.combat: 1 para atacar, 2 para utilizar magia e 3 para utilizar itens caso você tenha algum.
